sub_modules.dct1d_8_coeff_rom: Combinational fixed-point orthonormal DCT/IDCT coefficient ROM using Q14 cosine matrix values.
sub_modules.dct1d_8_mac: Combinational 8-tap signed multiply-accumulate row engine for one transform output.
sub_modules.dct1d_8_round_saturate: Combinational Q14 rounding, arithmetic scaling, and signed output saturation block.
